questions.question: Ek boutique business kya provide karta hai primarily?

options.B: Custom-made ya unique fashion items

questions.explanation: Boutique businesses unique aur custom-made fashion items provide karte hain, jo unhe mass-produced garments se alag banata hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business ka main focus kis par hota hai?

options.B: Garments ki fitting, alterations aur custom stitching

questions.explanation: Tailoring business ka core kaam garments ki perfect fitting, alterations aur client ki specifications ke according custom stitching karna hota hai.

questions.question: Boutique aur tailoring business mein success ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Quality craftsmanship aur customer satisfaction

questions.explanation: Quality craftsmanship aur customer satisfaction boutique aur tailoring businesses ki safalta ki key hai. Customer ko achhi quality aur achha experience milna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek boutique business kis type ke customers ko target karta hai?

options.A: Jo sirf sabse saste kapde dhundh rahe hain
options.B: Jo unique designs aur personalized service chahte hain
options.C: Jo sirf branded items kharidte hain

questions.explanation: Boutique businesses un customers ko target karte hain jo uniqueness, exclusivity aur personalized shopping experience ko value karte hain.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'alterations' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Existing kapdo ki fitting ya style mein change karna

questions.explanation: Alterations ka matlab hai existing garments mein zarurat ke hisaab se changes karna, jaise length kam karna, waist adjust karna, etc.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'niche market' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi type ke customers ko target karna
options.B: Ek specific segment of customers ko cater karna

questions.explanation: Niche market ka matlab hai ek chhota, specific market segment jiske paas unique needs aur preferences hain, jise boutique target kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek successful boutique ke liye 'customer experience' kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki customers ko zyaada wait na karna pade
options.B: Taki customers repeat purchase karein aur word-of-mouth promotion ho
options.D: Taki staff ko zyaada kaam na karna pade

questions.explanation: Positive customer experience repeat business aur valuable word-of-mouth referrals generate karta hai, jo business growth ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'bespoke' services ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Har customer ke liye individual measurements aur design ke saath kapde banana

questions.explanation: Bespoke tailoring mein garments ko individual customer ke specific measurements, body type aur design preferences ke according scratch se banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Boutique business mein 'curation' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Ek specific aesthetic ya theme ke according products ko carefully select karna
options.C: Kisi bhi brand ke kapde bechna
options.D: Sabhi items ko ek hi price par bechna

questions.explanation: Curation ka matlab hai ek unique identity aur brand image create karne ke liye products ko thoughtfully choose karna, jo boutique ke target audience ko appeal kare.

questions.question: Ek tailoring shop mein 'trial room' kyon essential hai?

options.A: Customers ke liye rest karne ke liye
options.B: Garments ki fitting check karne aur alterations mark karne ke liye
options.D: Garments ko display karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Trial room customers ko garments try karne aur tailor ko necessary alterations mark karne mein help karta hai, jo perfect fit ke liye zaruri hai.

questions.question: Boutique business mein 'seasonal trends' ka kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Inventory aur design selection ko influence karte hain
options.D: Customer service standards ko decide karte hain

questions.explanation: Seasonal trends boutique ke inventory, design choices aur marketing strategies ko directly affect karte hain, taki current fashion demands ko meet kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'delivery time' kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki staff ko zyaada kaam na karna pade
options.B: Customer satisfaction aur trust maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Taki zyaada charges liye ja sake

questions.explanation: Prompt delivery customer satisfaction aur trust building ke liye critical hai. Time par delivery na hone se customer dissatisfied ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Boutique business mein 'brand identity' develop karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki competitors se alag dikhe aur customers ko attract kare
options.B: Taki products ki price kam rakhi ja sake
options.C: Taki staff ko uniform pehna sake
options.D: Taki shop ka interior design ho sake

questions.explanation: Strong brand identity business ko competitors se differentiate karti hai, customer loyalty banati hai aur target audience ko attract karti hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'measurement taking' mein accuracy kyon zaruri hai?

options.A: Taki zyaada fabric use na ho
options.B: Perfect fit aur customer satisfaction ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Taki stitching mein kam time lage

questions.explanation: Accurate measurements perfect fit aur comfortable garment banane ki foundation hain, jo customer satisfaction ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Ek boutique ke liye 'visual merchandising' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Products ko store mein randomly arrange karna
options.B: Products ko attractive tareeke se display karna customer ko engage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Visual merchandising products ko aesthetically pleasing tareeke se present karta hai, jo customers ko attract karta hai aur purchase decision ko influence karta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'fabric knowledge' kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki koi bhi fabric use kiya ja sake
options.B: Right fabric ko right design aur client ki requirement ke according choose karne ke liye
options.C: Taki fabric ko waste kiya ja sake
options.D: Taki fabric ko jaldi cut kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Fabric knowledge tailor ko garment ke design, drape aur client ki comfort ke liye best fabric suggest karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Boutique aur Tailoring industry mein 'sustainability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmental aur social responsibility ko consider karte hue business operate karna
options.C: Business ko hamesha profit mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Sustainability ka matlab hai business practices ko environment-friendly aur socially responsible tareeke se conduct karna, jaise ethical sourcing, waste reduction, etc.

questions.question: Boutique ya tailoring business start karne ke liye pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Business plan create karna

questions.explanation: Ek detailed business plan create karna sabse pehla aur crucial step hai, jo business ke goals, strategies aur financial projections ko outline karta hai.

questions.question: India mein small business ke liye kaun sa registration common hai?

options.B: Proprietorship ya Partnership registration

questions.explanation: Proprietorship ya Partnership registration small businesses ke liye common aur relatively simple options hain, jo legal identity provide karte hain.

questions.question: Business location choose karte waqt kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Target audience ki accessibility, visibility aur competition

questions.explanation: Location ka selection target audience ki ease of access, business ki visibility aur nearby competition jaise factors par depend karta hai.

questions.question: GST registration kab mandatory ho jata hai business ke liye?

options.A: Jab sales ₹1 lakh se zyada ho
options.B: Jab turnover prescribed limit (currently ₹20 lakh or ₹40 lakh) cross kar jaata hai
options.C: Jab koi bhi product becha jaaye

questions.explanation: GST registration mandatory ho jata hai jab business ka annual turnover prescribed limit (jo state aur nature of business par depend karta hai, usually ₹20 lakh ya ₹40 lakh) cross kar jaata hai.

questions.question: Boutique business ke liye initial capital kahan se mil sakta hai?

options.B: Personal savings, bank loans, MUDRA loans ya family support
options.C: Kisi bhi friend se udhaar lekar
options.D: Kisi bhi shop se maang kar

questions.explanation: Initial capital ke liye personal savings, bank loans (jaise MUDRA loan), aur family ya friends se support common sources hain.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Executive Summary' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Pure business plan ka concise overview dena

questions.explanation: Executive Summary business plan ka ek brief overview hota hai, jo key points aur business ke main objectives ko highlight karta hai.

questions.question: Ek tailoring shop ke liye kaun sa equipment essential hai?

options.B: Sewing machines, cutting tables, ironing equipment

questions.explanation: Sewing machines, cutting tables aur ironing equipment tailoring shop ke basic aur essential tools hain.

questions.question: Zoning regulations kya hote hain business ke liye?

options.B: Kisi specific area mein kis type ka business operate ho sakta hai, yeh define karte hain

questions.explanation: Zoning regulations local government ke rules hote hain jo specify karte hain ki kis area mein residential, commercial ya industrial activities allowed hain.

questions.question: 'Trade License' kis liye zaruri hota hai?

options.B: Kisi bhi specific trade ya business ko operate karne ke liye local municipal authority se permission

questions.explanation: Trade license ek legal document hai jo local municipal corporation ya health department provide karta hai, allowing a person to conduct a specific trade or business.

questions.question: Business insurance kyon important hai?

options.B: Unexpected losses ya liabilities se business ko protect karne ke liye
options.C: Customer ko free gifts dene ke liye
options.D: Staff ko bonus dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Business insurance financial risks jaise theft, fire, liability claims, etc. se protection provide karta hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye attractive 'storefront' kyon important hai?

options.B: Passers-by ko attract karne aur business ki image create karne ke liye
options.D: Extra space provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek attractive storefront business ki visibility badhata hai aur potential customers ko store ke andar aane ke liye encourage karta hai.

questions.question: Sole Proprietorship aur Partnership mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: Sole Proprietorship mein ek owner hota hai, Partnership mein do ya do se zyada
options.B: Sole Proprietorship mein tax nahi lagta, Partnership mein lagta hai
options.C: Sole Proprietorship mein koi liability nahi hoti
options.D: Partnership mein sirf family members ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Sole Proprietorship mein business ka ek hi owner hota hai, jabki Partnership mein do ya do se zyada individuals business ke owners hote hain.

questions.question: MUDRA loan scheme kis liye hai?

options.A: Large corporations ko fund karne ke liye
options.B: Small aur micro enterprises ko financial assistance provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: MUDRA (Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency) loan scheme small aur micro enterprises ko collateral-free loans provide karti hai.

questions.question: FSSAI license kis type ke businesses ke liye zaruri hai?

options.B: Food-related businesses ke liye

questions.explanation: FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) license food-related businesses ke liye mandatory hai, tailoring ke liye nahi.

questions.question: Business registration ke liye PAN card kyon zaruri hai?

options.B: Tax purposes aur financial transactions ke liye

questions.explanation: PAN (Permanent Account Number) card tax related matters aur financial transactions ke liye essential hai, aur business registration ke liye bhi zaruri hota hai.

questions.question: Ek boutique ke liye 'interior design' kyon important hai?

options.B: Customer ko inviting feel karwane aur brand image ko reflect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Interior design customer ke shopping experience ko enhance karta hai, brand ki identity ko reinforce karta hai aur comfortable atmosphere provide karta hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Market Analysis' section ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf apne products ki list banana
options.B: Target market, competition aur industry trends ko research aur understand karna

questions.explanation: Market analysis business ko market opportunities, challenges, target audience aur competitive landscape ko samajhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion design mein 'mood board' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Design inspiration, color palette aur theme ko visually represent karna

questions.explanation: Mood board ek visual tool hai jo design process ke liye inspiration, colors, textures aur overall theme ko communicate karta hai.

questions.question: 'Pattern making' ka kya matlab hai tailoring mein?

options.B: Garment ke various parts ke templates banana jo fabric par cut kiye jaayenge

questions.explanation: Pattern making mein paper par garment ke har piece ke liye templates create kiye jaate hain, jo fabric cutting ke liye guide karte hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric natural fiber se banta hai?

options.B: Nylon

questions.explanation: Cotton ek natural fiber hai jo cotton plant se aata hai, jabki Polyester, Nylon aur Rayon synthetic ya man-made fibers hain.

questions.question: Stitching mein 'seam allowance' kyon diya jaata hai?

options.B: Stitching ke liye space provide karne aur garment ko finish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seam allowance fabric ka woh extra portion hota hai jo stitching lines ke bahar rakha jaata hai, seams ko join karne aur finish karne ke liye.

questions.question: Quality control mein 'garment inspection' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Defects, stitching quality aur overall finish check karna

questions.explanation: Garment inspection product ki quality, standards aur customer expectations ko meet karne ke liye defects aur finishing ko check karta hai.

questions.question: 'Draping' method ka kya use hota hai fashion design mein?

options.A: Directly fabric ko dress form par manipulate karke design create karna
options.B: Computer par designs banana

questions.explanation: Draping mein fabric ko 3D form par manipulate karke design create kiya jaata hai, jo garment ka exact look aur fit deta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'interfacing' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Garment ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric ko structure, support aur crispness provide karne ke liye
options.C: Garment ko color karne ke liye
options.D: Garment ko waterproof banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek extra layer of fabric hota hai jo specific areas (jaise collars, cuffs) ko rigidity aur shape dene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa stitch temporary hota hai aur baad mein remove kar diya jaata hai?

options.B: Basting stitch

questions.explanation: Basting stitch garments ko temporary hold karne ke liye use hota hai aur final stitching ke baad remove kar diya jaata hai.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'ready-to-wear' (RTW) garments ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Standard sizes mein mass-produced garments jo turant kharid kar pehne ja sakte hain

questions.explanation: Ready-to-wear garments factory mein standard sizes mein banaye jaate hain aur customers unhe bina kisi alteration ke turant kharid kar pehen sakte hain.

questions.question: Quality control mein 'AQL' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Acceptable Quality Limit

questions.explanation: AQL (Acceptable Quality Limit) ek statistical method hai jo production batch mein kitne defects allowed hain, yeh determine karta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'darts' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Fabric ko body ke curves ke according shape dena

questions.explanation: Darts fabric mein folds hote hain jo stitching se create kiye jaate hain, taki flat fabric ko 3D body shape ke according fit kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool fabric ko straight cut karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Scissors / Shears

questions.explanation: Scissors ya shears fabric ko precisely cut karne ke liye essential tools hain.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'capsule collection' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi item ka collection
options.B: Ek chhota, cohesive collection of versatile pieces jo ek saath mix-and-match ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Capsule collection ek limited selection of interchangeable clothing items hota hai jo ek specific period ya theme ke liye design kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'pressing' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf kapdo ko sukhane ke liye
options.B: Stitches ko set karne, seams ko flat karne aur garment ko professional finish dene ke liye
options.C: Kapdo ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Kapdo ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pressing stitching process ka ek crucial step hai jo garment ko crisp aur well-finished look deta hai, seams ko smooth karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion sketch mein 'croquis' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Ek basic figure outline jis par designs sketch kiye jaate hain

questions.explanation: Croquis ek pre-drawn fashion figure hota hai jo designers ko fabric, details aur silhouette par focus karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa stitch fabric edges ko fray hone se rokta hai?

options.B: Back stitch

questions.explanation: Overlock ya serger stitch fabric edges ko neatly finish karta hai aur fraying se bachata hai, jo professional garments mein common hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'collection development' mein 'storyboard' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Design concept, mood, color scheme aur fabric choices ko visually plan karna

questions.explanation: Storyboard ek comprehensive visual tool hai jo collection ki narrative, design elements aur overall vision ko plan aur communicate karta hai.

questions.question: Inventory management mein 'stocktaking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Physical inventory ko count karna aur records se match karna

questions.explanation: Stocktaking physical inventory count karne aur usse business records se reconcile karne ka process hai, jo accuracy ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric sourcing mein 'vendor selection' mein kya important hai?

options.B: Quality, reliability, pricing aur delivery time

questions.explanation: Vendor selection mein quality, reliability, competitive pricing aur timely delivery jaise factors crucial hote hain taaki smooth supply chain maintain ho.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'dead stock' kya hota hai?

options.B: Items jo lambe time se bik nahi rahe hain
options.C: Items jo abhi order kiye gaye hain
options.D: Items jo customers ne return kiye hain

questions.explanation: Dead stock woh inventory hota hai jo lambe samay se bik nahi raha hai, resulting in financial loss aur storage costs.

questions.question: 'Just-in-Time' (JIT) inventory system ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Inventory holding costs ko kam karna aur waste reduce karna

questions.explanation: JIT system mein inventory tabhi receive kiya jaata hai jab uski zarurat ho, jisse storage costs kam hote hain aur obsolescence ka risk reduce hota hai.

questions.question: Tailoring shop mein 'material wastage' ko kaise control kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Efficient pattern layout, accurate cutting aur proper training se
options.C: Kisi bhi tarah se cut karke

questions.explanation: Efficient pattern layout, precise cutting techniques aur skilled staff material wastage ko significantly reduce kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Supply chain management mein 'lead time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Order place karne se lekar product receive hone tak ka total time
options.D: Customer ko product dene ka time

questions.explanation: Lead time woh total time hota hai jo order karne se lekar uski delivery tak lagta hai, jisse inventory planning mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'visual inventory tracking' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Store mein items ko easily locate karna aur stock levels ko quickly assess karna

questions.explanation: Visual tracking se inventory ko effectively manage kiya ja sakta hai, jisse out-of-stock situations avoid hoti hain aur replenishment easy ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric suppliers ke saath 'long-term relationships' kyon beneficial hain?

options.B: Consistent quality, better pricing aur reliable supply ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf ek hi type ka fabric kharidne ke liye
options.D: Kabhi bhi order na karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Strong vendor relationships consistent quality, favourable terms aur reliable supply provide karte hain, jo business ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Inventory control mein 'FIFO' method ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric In, Fabric Out

questions.explanation: FIFO (First In, First Out) inventory management method mein pehle kharide gaye items ko pehle becha jaata hai, jo spoilage aur obsolescence ko reduce karta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring shop mein 'fabric remnants' (bache hue tukde) ka kya use ho sakta hai?

options.B: Small accessories banane, patchwork ya sample work ke liye use karna
options.D: Fuel ke roop mein use karna

questions.explanation: Fabric remnants ko creatively use karke waste reduce kiya ja sakta hai aur small, value-added products banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: 'Minimum Order Quantity' (MOQ) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jo sabse kam item aap order kar sakte hain
options.B: Supplier se kharidne ke liye zaruri items ki minimum quantity

questions.explanation: MOQ woh minimum quantity hai jo supplier se order karna zaruri hai, jise negotiate karna ya uske according planning karna important hota hai.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'reorder point' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf jab stock khatam ho jaaye tab order karna
options.B: Stock level jab ek specific point par pahunch jaaye tab naya order place karna

questions.explanation: Reorder point ek specific stock level hai jise hit karte hi naya order place kiya jaata hai, taaki out-of-stock situations avoid ho sakein.

questions.question: Supply chain mein 'quality assurance' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Throughout the production process quality standards maintain karna

questions.explanation: Quality assurance ek proactive approach hai jo production ke har stage par quality standards ko ensure karta hai, defects ko minimize karne ke liye.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'trimming' (buttons, zippers) ki inventory kaise manage karein?

options.A: Sirf jab zarurat ho tab kharidna
options.B: Regularly stock check karna aur popular items ko sufficient quantity mein rakhna
options.C: Bahut saare trimmings kharid kar rakhna
options.D: Customers ko apne trimmings laane ko kehna

questions.explanation: Trimmings ki inventory ko effectively manage karna zaruri hai, popular items ko sufficient stock mein rakhna aur slow-moving items ko avoid karna.

questions.question: Kaun sa software inventory management mein help kar sakta hai?

options.B: Spreadsheets (Excel) ya dedicated inventory management software

questions.explanation: Spreadsheets jaise Excel ya specific inventory management software stock levels, sales aur reorder points ko track karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'consignment inventory' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Products jo aapne kharid liye hain
options.B: Products jo supplier ke hain aur aap tabhi payment karte hain jab woh bik jaayen
options.C: Products jo customers ne return kiye hain
options.D: Products jo gift ke roop mein mile hain

questions.explanation: Consignment inventory mein supplier ownership retain karta hai aur retailer tabhi payment karta hai jab item bik jaata hai, jisse retailer ka upfront cost kam hota hai.

questions.question: Supply chain mein 'logistics' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Products, services aur information ke flow ko manage karna, starting from origin to consumption

questions.explanation: Logistics mein raw materials ki sourcing se lekar final product ki delivery tak ka poora management aata hai, jisme transportation, warehousing, etc. shamil hain.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'social media marketing' kyon important hai?

options.B: Brand visibility badhane, target audience se engage karne aur sales drive karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf photos post karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Social media platforms brand awareness create karne, customer engagement badhane aur naye customers ko attract karne ka ek powerful tool hain.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'word-of-mouth' marketing ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Satisfied customers ke through business ka promotion

questions.explanation: Word-of-mouth marketing tab hoti hai jab satisfied customers dusron ko business ke baare mein positive feedback dete hain, jo bahut effective hota hai.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'pricing strategy' decide karte waqt kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Cost of production, market demand, competition aur brand positioning

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy mein production costs, market trends, competitor pricing aur desired profit margins ko balance karna zaruri hai.

questions.question: 'Customer Relationship Management' (CRM) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Customer data manage karna, relationships improve karna aur loyalty badhana

questions.explanation: CRM customer interactions ko manage karne mein help karta hai, jisse customer satisfaction, retention aur loyalty badhti hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'upselling' ka ek example kya hai?

options.A: Customer ko koi aur shop recommend karna
options.B: Basic alteration ke saath matching accessory ya premium lining suggest karna
options.C: Customer ko kam price wala item bechna
options.D: Customer ko jaldi se shop se bahar bhej dena

questions.explanation: Upselling mein customer ko higher-value product ya service suggest karna shamil hai, jo unki current need ko enhance kare.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'email marketing' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Promotions, new arrivals aur exclusive offers customers ko communicate karna

questions.explanation: Email marketing direct communication ka ek effective tareeka hai jo customers ko engage rakhta hai aur sales drive karta hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'active listening' kyon important hai?

options.B: Customer ki needs aur concerns ko poori tarah samajhna aur respond karna

questions.explanation: Active listening customer ki requirements ko sahi tareeke se samajhne aur appropriate solution provide karne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'influencer marketing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Social media influencers ke through products ko promote karna

questions.explanation: Influencer marketing mein social media personalities ke saath collaborate kiya jaata hai, jinke followers ko target audience tak pahunchaya ja sake.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'feedback mechanism' kyon zaruri hai?

options.B: Services ko improve karne aur customer satisfaction measure karne ke liye
options.C: Customers ko bore karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback business ko apni strengths aur weaknesses ko samajhne mein help karta hai, jisse services aur customer experience improve hote hain.

questions.question: Boutique mein 'loyalty programs' ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Sirf naye customers ko attract karna
options.B: Repeat customers ko reward karna aur unki loyalty badhana

questions.explanation: Loyalty programs existing customers ko exclusive benefits aur discounts offer karte hain, jisse unka repeat business encourage hota hai.

questions.question: 'Personal selling' ka kya matlab hai boutique context mein?

options.B: Customer ke saath one-on-one interaction karke products recommend karna

questions.explanation: Personal selling mein sales associate customer ki needs ko samajhta hai aur personalized recommendations provide karta hai, jo boutique mein common hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'after-sales service' ka kya example hai?

options.B: Minor adjustments ya repairs offer karna even after delivery
options.D: Customer ko thank you note bhejna

questions.explanation: After-sales service customer satisfaction aur trust ko banaye rakhta hai, jaise free minor alterations ya follow-up calls.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'pop-up shops' kyon effective ho sakte hain?

options.B: Naye markets explore karne, brand awareness badhane aur limited-time engagement create karne ke liye
options.C: Permanent store open karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pop-up shops temporary retail spaces hote hain jo brands ko naye locations par test karne, buzz create karne aur naye customers tak pahunchne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'handling complaints' ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Calmly sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna
options.D: Complaint ko kisi aur par dal dena

questions.explanation: Effective complaint handling mein customer ko sunna, unki problem ko acknowledge karna aur ek satisfactory solution provide karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'online portfolio' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Past work aur expertise ko potential clients ko showcase karna

questions.explanation: Online portfolio tailor ke skills aur quality of work ko demonstrate karta hai, jo naye clients ko attract karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'press release' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: News media ko important announcements (new collection, event) ke baare mein inform karna

questions.explanation: Press release media coverage generate karne aur public ko business ke significant updates ke baare mein inform karne ka ek tool hai.

questions.question: Sales process mein 'closing the sale' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ko purchase decision lene mein help karna aur transaction complete karna

questions.explanation: Closing the sale sales process ka woh stage hai jahan customer purchase karne ke liye agree karta hai aur transaction finalise hota hai.

questions.question: Boutique business mein 'fixed costs' ka kya example hai?

options.B: Rent, insurance, salaries of permanent staff

questions.explanation: Fixed costs woh expenses hote hain jo production ya sales volume ke saath change nahi hote, jaise rent aur fixed salaries.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'variable costs' ka kya example hai?

options.B: Fabric, thread, buttons jaise raw materials

questions.explanation: Variable costs woh expenses hote hain jo production ya sales volume ke saath vary karte hain, jaise raw materials aur per-piece labour cost.

questions.question: 'Break-even point' ka kya matlab hai financial management mein?

options.A: Jab business ko profit ho raha ho
options.B: Jab total revenue total costs ke barabar ho, na profit na loss
options.C: Jab business ko loss ho raha ho

questions.explanation: Break-even point woh level of sales hai jahan business na profit kamata hai aur na loss karta hai, saare costs cover ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'cash flow management' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf zyaada cash rakhne ke liye
options.B: Business ke day-to-day operations aur bills pay karne ke liye sufficient cash flow ensure karna
options.D: Customers ko cash discount dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective cash flow management business ko apni financial obligations ko meet karne aur liquidity maintain karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'costing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek garment banane mein lagne wale saare expenses (material, labour, overhead) ko calculate karna
options.D: Customer se kitna paisa lena hai yeh decide karna

questions.explanation: Costing mein ek product ya service ko produce karne mein lagne wale direct aur indirect expenses ko calculate kiya jaata hai, jo pricing ke liye base banta hai.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'online presence' (website/e-commerce) kyon zaruri hai?

options.A: Sirf photos upload karne ke liye
options.B: Wider audience tak pahunchna, sales badhana aur brand visibility increase karna

questions.explanation: Online presence business ko global reach deta hai, naye customers ko attract karta hai aur additional sales channel provide karta hai.

questions.question: Growth strategy mein 'franchising' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi store open karna
options.B: Business model ko dusre individuals ko license dena taaki woh aapke brand ke under operate kar sakein

questions.explanation: Franchising ek expansion strategy hai jahan business owner apne brand, business model aur operational support ko dusre entrepreneurs ko license deta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'digital measurement tools' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Measurements mein accuracy badhana aur process ko faster banana

questions.explanation: Digital measurement tools jaise body scanners ya apps measurements mein higher accuracy aur efficiency provide karte hain.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'diversification' strategy ka kya example hai?

options.B: Clothing ke saath accessories, home decor ya styling services offer karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi type ka kapda bechna

questions.explanation: Diversification mein business naye products ya services introduce karta hai jo existing offerings se alag hote hain, jisse revenue streams badhte hain.

questions.question: Financial statements mein 'Profit & Loss (P&L) Statement' kya show karta hai?

options.B: Business ki revenue, expenses aur net profit ya loss over a period

questions.explanation: P&L statement business ki financial performance ko summarize karta hai, jisme income, expenses aur resulting profit/loss shamil hota hai.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'customer retention' ke liye kya strategy ho sakti hai?

options.B: Excellent service, loyalty programs aur personalized communication

questions.explanation: Customer retention mein existing customers ko loyal rakhne ke liye strategies use ki jaati hain, jaise personalized service aur special offers.

questions.question: Boutique ke liye 'sustainable practices' (e.g., ethical sourcing) kyon important hain?

options.A: Sirf trend follow karne ke liye
options.B: Brand image improve karne, environmentally conscious customers ko attract karne aur long-term viability ke liye
options.C: Products ki price badhane ke liye
options.D: Production cost kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sustainable practices brand ki reputation badhati hain, ethical consumers ko attract karti hain aur environmental impact ko kam karti hain.

questions.question: Financial management mein 'budgeting' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Future income aur expenses ko plan karna aur allocate karna

questions.explanation: Budgeting business ko apne financial resources ko effectively plan aur manage karne mein help karta hai, taaki financial goals achieve ho sakein.

questions.question: Tailoring business mein 'technology integration' ka kya example hai?

options.B: CAD software for pattern making, digital measurement tools ya online appointment booking system

questions.explanation: Technology integration efficiency badhata hai, accuracy improve karta hai aur customer experience ko modernise karta hai, jaise CAD for patterns ya online booking.

questions.question: Boutique business mein 'merger and acquisition' (M&A) kab consider kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf jab business loss mein ho
options.B: Rapid expansion, market share increase ya new capabilities gain karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf jab koi aur business offer kare

questions.explanation: M&A strategies business ko grow karne, competitive edge gain karne ya naye markets mein enter karne ke liye use ki jaati hain.
